title: Address doesn't transfer when linking between boards?

posts.author: JustinBerry (Justin Berry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using (when status changes to something create an item in another board and link) I can get all columns I want to transfer except for address. Address has the mapped symbol next to it and (location) is added.

Any idea how to workaround this?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JustinBerry, the address should map over if it’s in a location column. Any chance you can share a screenshot of your mapping and boards so I can take a closer look? You can also write in to us at support@monday.com with this info for a faster response

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
